title: Meerkat Finance - BSC - REKT
relevance_summary: Upgrade to a new contract implementation with a permissionless initialization function to drain funds
funds_lost: 13 million BUSD and about 73,000 BNB, currently totalling around $31m

prevention.rule: Block any tx that upgrades a contract with a permissionless initialization function
prevention.trigger: UPGRADE_TO -> init(address owner) in single tx

red_flags: upgradeTo() called twice to change Vault logic
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that upgrades a contract with a permissionless initialization function
summary: Meerkat Finance was exploited by upgrading the contract implementation to include a permissionless initialization function, allowing the attacker to drain the vaults. A guard could have prevented this by blocking any tx that upgrades a contract with a permissionless initialization function.
